LAW & MOTION, DEPT. 302, AS TO THE NOV-03-2022 HEARING RE: DEFENDANT CHINA BASIN BALLPARK COMPANY LLC'S MOTION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION OF COMPLAINT AND STAY PROCEEDINGS, THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING. DEFENDANT'S UNOPPOSED MOTION GRANTED. COUNSEL FOR THE PREVAILING PARTY IS REQUIRED TO PREPARE AND SUBMIT A PROPOSED ORDER WHICH STATES THAT THE MOTION WAS NOT OPPOSED. JUDGE: RICHARD B. ULMER JR.; CLERK: SEAN KANE; NOT REPORTED. (302/RBU)

calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-06-2023 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-28-2022 Continued To Jul-19-23 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Arbitration Of Complaint And Stay Proceedings
Off Calendar Nov-03-2022 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

HEARINGRE: DEFENDANT CHINA BASIN BALLPARK COMPANY LLC's Motion To Compel Arbitration Of Complaint And Stay Proceedings..

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Defendant's unopposed "motion to compel arbitration of complaint and stay proceedings" is granted.

Counsel for the prevailing party is required to prepare and submit a proposed order which states that the motion was not opposed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported. (302/RBU)
